message:
chore: add CHANGELOG.md skeleton with Keep a Changelog format

Initialize changelog with standard Keep a Changelog sections:
Added, Changed, Deprecated, Removed, Fixed, Security

Empty [Unreleased] section ready for tracking changes before next release.
Follows semantic versioning and https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.0.0/

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+# Changelog
+
+## [Unreleased]
+### Added
+### Changed
+### Deprecated
+### Removed
+### Fixed
+### Security
